comment: Every pre-recorded narrator line in Moonfall. Each id maps to an array of phrasing variants; the game picks one at random per playback so no two rounds sound the same. Files are named <id>.<variant>.mp3. Regenerate with scripts/generate_voice_pack.py.

preview: The village sleeps, and the tale continues.
Hush now. The moon is listening.
nightfall: Night falls on the village. Everyone, close your eyes.
Darkness takes the village. Close your eyes, all of you.
The moon rises over Moonfall. Sleep now, every soul.
cue-role-reveal: The cards have been dealt. Each player may now learn their secret fate.
Fate has chosen. Look upon your card in secret, then seal it away.
The deck has spoken. Discover who you truly are, and tell no one.
cue-setup-thief: The Thief wakes, looks upon the two cards left untouched, and may exchange their destiny.
Thief, open your eyes. Two spare fates lie before you. Choose, or keep your own.
The Thief stirs in the dark. Two unclaimed cards await your judgement.
cue-setup-cupid: Cupid wakes, and chooses two souls to bind together in love.
Cupid, open your eyes. Fire your arrow, and bind two hearts as one.
Cupid stirs. Two souls will be joined, until death divides them both.
cue-setup-lovers: Everyone, open your eyes. Cupid's arrow has flown. Turn over the card before you, to learn whether your heart is still your own.
Wake, all of you. The arrow has found its marks. Turn your card in secret, and discover if you are one of the chosen.
Open your eyes, village. Somewhere among you, two hearts were just bound. Turn over your card, and keep whatever you find to yourself.
cue-night-seer: The Seer wakes, and chooses one player whose true identity they wish to know.
Seer, open your eyes. One soul's truth will be revealed to you tonight.
The Seer stirs. Point to one player, and the moon will show you their face.
cue-night-wolves: The Werewolves wake. They recognise one another, and silently choose a victim.
The pack rises. Werewolves, find your kin, and agree upon tonight's prey.
Hungry eyes open in the dark. The Werewolves must choose who will not see the dawn.
cue-night-witch: The Witch wakes. Here is the victim chosen by the pack. Will fate be changed?
Witch, open your eyes. See what the pack has done. Your potions are waiting.
The Witch stirs over her cauldron. One life hangs in the balance tonight.
cue-sheriff-vote: The village will now elect a Sheriff, whose vote shall carry the weight of two.
Choose your Sheriff. From this day, their voice counts twice at every judgement.
The village needs a leader. Elect a Sheriff, and give their word double weight.
cue-day-discussion: The village square is yours. Speak carefully. Truth and lies wear the same face.
Debate begins. Accuse, defend, and watch every face around this table.
The square fills with voices. Somewhere among you, the pack is smiling.
cue-day-vote: On my signal, cast your judgement. The accused will not see the tally until it is sealed.
The time for words is over. Cast your votes, and let the village decide.
Point your finger. Every vote is secret until the ballot is sealed.
cue-hunter-shot: The Hunter has fallen, but one final shot remains. Hunter, open your eyes and choose.
Death cannot stop the Hunter's aim. One last bullet. Choose where it lands.
The Hunter falls, rifle still warm. One final shot echoes over the village.
cue-sheriff-successor: The Sheriff has fallen. Sheriff, open your eyes and pass the badge to a living soul.
The badge must not be buried. Sheriff, name the one who will carry it on.
A Sheriff has fallen. With their final breath, they choose a successor.
sleep-setup-thief: The Thief's choice is made. Sleep now.
The Thief returns to the dark.
sleep-setup-cupid: The arrow has flown. Cupid sleeps.
Cupid's work is done for this night.
sleep-setup-lovers: The truth is sealed. Everyone, close your eyes once more.
Every card is turned face-down again. Close your eyes, all of you.
The secret is kept. The village sleeps once more.
sleep-night-seer: The vision fades. The Seer sleeps.
The Seer returns to darkness, knowing more than before.
sleep-night-wolves: Sated, the pack melts back into the village.
The Werewolves sleep, hidden among the innocent.
sleep-night-witch: The potions are stoppered. The Witch sleeps.
The Witch's work is done. Darkness returns.
wake-village: Wake, all of you. The night is over.
Open your eyes, village of Moonfall.
dawn-none: The sun rises, and the village wakes to a miracle. Nobody died in the night.
Dawn breaks, and every soul still breathes. The night has taken no one.
Morning comes, and the village counts itself whole. Not one life was lost.
dawn-death: The sun rises, and the village wakes to sorrow. The night has claimed its price.
Dawn breaks over a grieving village. The darkness did not leave empty-handed.
Morning comes, cold and quiet. Someone did not wake with the rest of you.
another-death: And fate is not yet finished. Another soul has fallen.
The chain of fate pulls again. Another has been taken.
But death was not done. Another falls.
vote-tied: The vote is tied. By the old law of the village, nobody is eliminated today.
The village cannot agree. A tie spares everyone, for now.
Split down the middle. By ancient law, no one faces judgement today.
vote-none: No judgement was cast. Nobody leaves the village today.
The village stays its hand. No one is condemned.
No fingers were pointed. Everyone lives to argue another day.
vote-death: The village has spoken. The condemned steps forward.
Judgement is sealed. Step forward, condemned soul.
The tally is closed, and one name stands alone.
role-witch: The keeper of potions. The Witch.
role-hunter: The Hunter, of the final shot.
role-little-girl: The Little Girl, who dared to peek.
win-village: The village prevails. The last Werewolf has fallen.
Victory for the village. The pack is no more.
The final Werewolf falls, and Moonfall is free at last.
win-wolves: The pack devours the dawn. No villager remains alive.
The Werewolves have won. The village belongs to the pack.
Silence falls forever. The wolves feast, unopposed.
win-lovers: Love conquers the moon. Two bound hearts are the last souls alive.
Against every fate, the lovers alone survive. Love has won.
The village falls away, and only the lovers remain, together.
win-none: The village falls silent. No soul survived the final chain of fate.
Nothing stirs. Fate's last chain has claimed every soul.
Moonfall stands empty. Nobody survived the tale.
